text:

Commit:     Dmitri Goutnik <dmgk@FreeBSD.org>

    Mk/Uses/go.mk: Omit version control information

    Disable embedding of version control information [1] in binaries built
    by go1.18 and later.

    [1] https://tip.golang.org/doc/go1.18#go-version

    PR:             263390
